ILD.summary: 联合免疫抑制方案针对特定炎性表型的系统性硬化症相关间质性肺病有效。

ILD.title: Izalontamab brengitecan (Iza-bren; BL-B01D1), a first-in-class EGFR-HER3 bispecific antibody-drug conjugate, for patients with EGFR-mutated NSCLC: pooled analysis of phase I and phase II trials.
ILD.authors: Hong SD, Wang YS, Zhao HY, Zhao YY, Wang QM, Ma YX, Li YS, Huang Y, Yang YP, Fu ZM, Chen LK, Zhou F, Yang J, Li XY, Hou X, Zhou NN, Sun LH, Zhang GF, Cui JW, Wu L, Chen G, Zhang YX, Wang HY, Lv DQ, Shi JH, Jiang B, Li C, Li XL, Tang KJ, Yu Y, Ji YH, He ZY, Zhu Y, Zhu H, Xiao S, Zhou CC, Zhang L, Fang WF

ILD.title: Anticancer drug-induced interstitial lung disease: a critical appraisal of clinical practice guidelines and consensus statements.

ILD.summary: 现有抗癌药物致间质性肺炎指南方法学质量参差不齐，类固醇治疗方案建议不一致。

ILD.summary: 免疫检查点抑制剂相关肺炎不常见但严重，是高死亡风险的不良事件，需及时识别与管理。

ILD.summary: 儿童间质性肺病三步诊断分类法可有效区分病因，遗传检测确诊率达50.8%。

ILD.summary: 摘要缺失。

ILD.title: The evolving comorbidity landscape of rheumatoid arthritis.
ILD.authors: Brooks RT, England BR, Kronzer VL, Crowson CS
ILD.summary: 类风湿关节炎共病谱转变：间质性肺病、焦虑抑郁负担上升，需加强筛查。

ILD.title: Lung-only involvement in STING-associated vasculopathy with onset in infancy: a diagnostic pitfall in the absence of cutaneous vasculitis.

ILD.summary: 抗MDA5抗体阳性皮肌炎相关间质性肺病病情凶险，三联疗法可改善预后。
